International Box Office $100,431,771
Worldwide Box Office $153,329,844

DVD Sales (estimated) $39,945,562
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $189,676
Total $40,135,238

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$9,300,805 (17.6% of total gross)
Legs:5.69 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:34.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:1,249 opening theaters/1,507 max. theaters, 6.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $90,337,648

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 21st, 2007 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: August 22nd, 2024 (Limited), released as Sweeney Todd: El Barbero Diabólico De La Calle Fleet (Re-release) (Mexico)
Video Release: April 1st, 2008 by Dreamworks Video
MPA Rating: R for graphic bloody violence
Running Time: 117 minutes
Award win: Golden Globe Winner Best Picture—Musical or Comedy
Plot point: Cannibalism, Food, Prison, Revenge, Serial Killer
Subgenre: Genre Mashup
Source:Based on Musical or Opera
Genre:Musical
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Historical Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: DreamWorks Pictures, Paramount Pictures, Parkes+Macdonald Productions, Zancuk Company, Image Nation
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
